blockedAssertions.blockedBy: Pending robustness-graceful-shutdown feature: SIGTERM still produces no attached-user shutdown notification, so shutdown propagation cannot yet be confirmed end-to-end.

appliedUpdates.description: Added a relay-bot integration note that VAL-CROSS-020 currently needs a dedicated isolated Node harness because integration-core-flows does not yet cover server SIGTERM shutdown propagation.
